_readme: Claude appends an entry here whenever deck data or app behavior changes (newest first). Shown verbose in the settings footer, but ONLY for the JST account. Keep summaries short; details are 1-line bullets.

entries.summary: Card-back polish: readable lemma, clearer selected sense, restyled Deck Complete popup
details: Card-back lemma now uses a brightened accent tint (color-mix + shadow) so it reads clearly against the dark back instead of the low-contrast raw accent red
Selected sense row now gets a left accent bar + soft accent glow (on top of the existing tint/border) so the active meaning is obvious across all row types, including unassigned and grouped rows

Deck Complete popup restyled to match the app's modal aesthetic: centered header with icon + accuracy pill, cleaner stat tiles with labels, and on-theme accent-primary primary button (was off-theme blue)

entries.summary: Lemma mode: deck now ordered by pooled lemma frequency
details: One-card-per-lemma now sums each lemma's frequency across all its collapsed forms (es + son + eres + soy… → ser), matching the example pooling
Deck order reflects that total, so the most common lemmas come first: ser rises to 3,666 (rep 'es' alone was 1,284), ir to 1,536; verbs spread across rare forms surface by true frequency
The 'Frequency: N' on a lemma card now shows the pooled total. Front-end only, no rebuild

entries.summary: Bad Bunny deck rebuilt: common-word meanings fixed + 1,385 missing words recovered
details: Top homograph cards fixed: para = 'for' (was 'to stop'), como = 'like' (was 'to eat'), todo = 'everything', cara = 'face', camino = 'road'
1,385 words that showed no card are back: las, dime, otra, así, bebé, nada, hay, calle, rico, ustedes…
Curated cognates now hidden (baby, flow, haters…); sense frequencies re-aligned to the current master; your study progress + all curations preserved
Still to come (separate step): April sense-classification errors like media='sock' need a Gemini re-run; synonyms/antonyms panels left off to keep the deck lean

entries.summary: Example lines: cards now lead with a clear, well-sized sentence
details: Fixed the picker that showed the longest lyric line ~80% of the time — 'nunca' used to open with a 71-word spoken monologue; now a 10-word line
Prefers a 6–14 word window, demotes lines with no English translation, caps deck-word overlap so length no longer wins; recently-missed words still boosted
Front-end only, no deck rebuild. Cache bumped 20260721a / v44

entries.summary: Your FlaggedWords processed: 27 live-deck cards fixed
details: PR slang glosses: palomo=sucker, galla=hot girl, sata=vixen, coro=crew, corta=gun (all 4 senses), pepas=pill, bajita=on the low, perse=chase/heat, fuletazo=gunshot, pacho hidden as ad-lib
Lemma repairs: to's=todos (was tos/cough), toitas=todita (was torta/cake), pasandola=pasar (was parar), revelas=rebelarse (official transl. 'Rebellious'), galla, sata, corta, fuletazo
Duplicate/wrong senses blanked: vengan (to come x3), volver (to turn x2, no examples), recoge, compre, tabla (surfboard), viene (next), todos, ven (ver card glossed 'come')
Re-glossed: falta (hacer falta senses), jodios pos VERB->ADJ, polo sense1=pole, tropiezo sense0=noun, chorro=a bunch of
6 of your flags (des, okay, panty, down, light, whatsapp) were already fixed in the May sweeps; verdes/versatil/levante checked out correct on inspection
Deck fully green on the bench again (only known menu_bloat 25 remains, dies at wikt cutover)

entries.summary: Lemma mode now pools examples from all forms of the lemma
details: One-card-per-lemma cards now show lyric/example lines from every collapsed form (quiero + quieres + quiere ... on the querer card)
Sibling examples attach to the matching sense (same translation), deduped by sentence, capped at 25/sense; each carries pooledFrom for future UI
Works in normal, single-artist, and multi-artist modes; no data rebuild needed (front-end only, cache tags bumped to 20260713a)

entries.summary: Wiktionary port Phase 0 report + 6 bug cards fixed
details: Coverage report: 96% of visible BB cards have Wiktionary senses; all 24 menu-bloat cases dissolve
Fixed: sea='mar'→ser, vine='vid'→venir, mire, 'tás='bench block'→estás, mía='to miaow'→mine, besos='collision'→kiss
Conjugations rebuilt with repaired lemmas (frontear, josear, ... now have tables + tags)

entries.summary: verbose_def 110->0: all sentence-glosses shortened; deck fully green
details: ~80 Gemini sentence-definitions cut to flashcard glosses (bellaquita, tiguere, pikete, rulay, ...)
Gems: roles=Rolex, pos/po'=por, opo=cut-off 'oportunidad', pre=pre-game, nano=bro
Hidden: strippers/men (EN), laramercy (gang), diesel/safari/portobello/pose/amén (cognates), auch/ea/wuff (interjections)
Every bench class now 0 except menu_bloat (25, needs sense-pipeline rework)

entries.summary: Blank rows filled, verb morph tags on artist cards, shorter examples first
details: 36 blank-gloss senses filled (dar, saber a, caer, volver a, se impersonal, …)
Artist verb cards now show tense/person tags (was 0% coverage; e.g. vi = preterite 1sg)
Normal-mode examples reordered: short sentences display first (no data lost)
eramos→ser fixed; barea/let's hidden; conjugation build extended to artist lemmas (rerun pending)
20 slang verb lemmas repaired (frontear ×6, perrear, josear, 'tas→estar…); Tatís/Play/do/lego hidden

entries.summary: Freshness footer + fetch tracking on all load paths
details: Settings footer shows data Last-Modified + fetch time (this panel)
Multi-artist merge + CSV paths now tracked too
Cache bumped to v38 to force fresh data

entries.summary: Detector sweep: 78 junk cards hidden, 25 glosses fixed (no rerun)
details: 'tán' now = "are (short for 'están')" — was 9 suntan senses from English 'tan'
Hidden: rob/'syrup', vegas/'meadow', carmen/'poem', so, too, game, cash, +70 more
Fixed: media='half', manín='bro', mera='hey!', cuki='cutie'
2 new bench detectors (verbatim-EN, mid-line caps) now guard regressions
